---
title: "Building Tests"
format: html

previous:
  href: "Modular-managing assets.html"
  text: "Managing lists using R"

next:
  href: "Modular-Sandpit.html"
  text: "Sandpit"
---

## End-of-unit quizzes

Quizzes can help to reinforce learning and identify weaknesses for the learner to build upon. This OER uses a simple interactive quiz built using HTML and JavaScript. You can adapt this structure to create your own assessments.

## Example: end-of-unit quiz

The following elements work together to make a quiz interactive:

-   Each question uses a name attribute (e.g. `name="q1"`, `name="q2"`) to group answer options.

-   The correct answer for each group is marked using a custom attribute: `data-correct="true"`.

-   When the learner clicks **Submit**, the script checks which answers have been selected and it counts how many inputs have the attribute `data-correct="true"`.

-   The total score is calculated and used to generate feedback.

-   Feedback is displayed in the results container on the page. This is the area where the score and message appear after submission.

### Questions

```{r, eval=FALSE}

## Quiz

<form id="quiz">

<!-- Q1 -->
<p><strong>1) What does OER stand for?</strong><br>
<label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="A"> A) Open Educational Research</label><br>
<label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="B" data-correct="true"> B) Open Educational Resource</label><br>
<label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="C"> C) Online Education Resource</label></p>

<!-- Q2 -->
<p><strong>2) Which licence allows reuse and adaptation?</strong><br>
<label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="A"> A) CC BY ND</label><br>
<label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="B" data-correct="true"> B) CC BY</label><br>
<label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="C"> C) CC BY NC</label></p>

<!-- Submit button -->
<p><a href="#" id="submit-link">✔️ Submit</a></p>

</form>

```

::: callout
## Working example questions

<form id="quiz">

<!-- Q1 -->

<p><strong>1) What does OER stand for?</strong><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="A"> A) Open Educational Research</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="B" data-correct="true"> B) Open Educational Resource</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="C"> C) Online Education Resource</label></p>

<!-- Q2 -->

<p><strong>2) Which licence allows reuse and adaptation?</strong><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="A"> A) CC BY ND</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="B" data-correct="true"> B) CC BY</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="C"> C) CC BY NC</label></p>

<!-- Submit button -->

<p><a href="#" id="submit-link">✔️ Submit</a></p>

</form>
:::

### Container

The following creates a container where quiz results will be inserted dynamically after they are calculated.

```{r, eval=FALSE}
---

## Result

::: {#result style="font-weight: bold; margin-top: 1em;"}
:::

---
```

:::: callout
## Example dynamic results

::: {#result style="font-weight: bold; margin-top: 1em;"}
:::
::::

### Javascript

This section uses JavaScript to:

-   Detect when the user clicks **Submit**;
-   Count how many correct answers have been selected;
-   Calculate a score;
-   Display feedback in the results container.

```{r, eval=FALSE}
## Quiz Logic

<script>
document.getElementById("submit-link").addEventListener("click", function (e) {
  e.preventDefault();

  const form = document.getElementById("quiz");

  // Count correct answers
  const correct = form.querySelectorAll('input[data-correct="true"]:checked').length;
  const total = 2;

  const result = document.getElementById("result");

  let message = `You scored ${correct}/${total}. `;

  if (correct === total) {
    message += "Excellent!";
  } else if (correct >= 1) {
    message += "Good effort — review and try again.";
  } else {
    message += "You may want to revisit the material.";
  }

  result.textContent = message;
});
</script>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.getElementById("submit-link").addEventListener("click", function (e) {
  e.preventDefault();

  const form = document.getElementById("quiz");

  // Count correct answers
  const correct = form.querySelectorAll('input[data-correct="true"]:checked').length;
  const total = 2;

  const result = document.getElementById("result");

  let message = `You scored ${correct}/${total}. `;

  if (correct === total) {
    message += "Excellent!";
  } else if (correct >= 1) {
    message += "Good effort — review and try again.";
  } else {
    message += "You may want to revisit the material.";
  }

  result.textContent = message;
});
</script>
```

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: Modular-Sandpit.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/Modular%20OERs/Modular-Sandpit.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
